data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
select tm.* from ( select sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date, sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id,
(select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) as s_item_amount,
(select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'F') as s_item_amount_mode_f,
sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode, case sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode when 'F' then 'ชำระหนี้กองทุนค้ำประกัน' when 'R' then 'ชำระหนี้เก็บไม่ได้' else '' end as receipt_mode_des,
( select sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name ||' '||case sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode when 'F' then 'ชำระหนี้กองทุนค้ำประกัน' when 'R' then 'ชำระหนี้เก็บไม่ได้' else '' end as money_type_mode from sc_com_m_ucf_money_type where sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ) as money_type_name, sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no||' : '||(select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code)||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, ( select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and (sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'FUN' or sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'MFEE' ) ) as fund_new, /*กองทุนใหม่*/ ( select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type where sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'SHR' ) as by_share, /*ซื้อหุ้นพิเศษ*/
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type where sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'MFE' ) as fee, /*ค่าธรรมเนียมสมาชิก*/
0.00 as crem_amount, /*ฌาปนกิจ*/ 0.00 as c_dep, /*เงินฝาก*/ sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id, /*ผู้บันทึก*/ sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id,
( select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as principal_amount_01,
( select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as interest_amount_01,
( select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as interest_amount_02,
( select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as principal_amount_02,
( select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '03' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as principal_amount_03,
( select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '03' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as interest_amount_03,
nvl(sum(decode(sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code,'01',1,0)),0) as count_01, nvl(sum(decode(sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code,'02',1,0)),0) as count_02, nvl(sum(decode(sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code,'03',1,0)),0) as count_03 , (select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'FL') as free_amount
,(select mr.month_receive_month from sc_com_m_receipt mr where mr.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no) as receipt_month
,(select to_number(to_char(receipt_date ,'mm')) from sc_com_m_receipt mr where mr.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no) as month_receipt_date
--ส่วนสรุปหักเก็บไม่ได้-- ,( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'R' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as R_principal_amount_01,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'R' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as R_interest_amount_01,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'R' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as R_interest_amount_02,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'R' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as R_principal_amount_02,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '03' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'R' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as R_principal_amount_03,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '03' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'R' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as R_interest_amount_03,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type where sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LFE' ) as dep_66, /*เงินฝาก 66*/
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_code is not null and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_code != '0' ) --*เอาเฉพาะสัญญาไม่ปกติ and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id not in ( 'TBK' , 'CLR' , 'AOP' ,'TRL' ,'FUN' , 'CRC') ) as loan_code_principal_amount,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_code is not null and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_code != '0' ) --*เอาเฉพาะสัญญาไม่ปกติ and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id not in ( 'TBK' , 'CLR' , 'AOP' ,'TRL' ,'FUN' , 'CRC') ) as loan_code_interest_amount
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type, sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group
where sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type or sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'SB' ) /* แก้ไขซื่อหุ้นอย่างเดียวไม่ขึ้น */ and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 and exists (select null from sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 and receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no) and 1=2 /*WHERE*/ -- and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = 'พ6015134' -- and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date between '21/08/2017' and '22/08/2017' -- and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = 'TRB' group by sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date ,sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.finance_date ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code ,sc_com_m_receipt.recept_amount ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type order by sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date, sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode, sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id, sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no )tm

data.name: total.Expression
data.value: Iif(IsNull([FUND_NEW]),0 ,[FUND_NEW] ) + Iif(IsNull([BY_SHARE]),0,[BY_SHARE] ) + Iif(IsNull([CREM_AMOUNT]),0,[CREM_AMOUNT] ) + Iif(IsNull([PRINCIPAL_01]),0 ,[PRINCIPAL_01] ) + Iif(IsNull([LOAN_01]),0,[LOAN_01] ) + Iif(IsNull([PRINCIPAL_02]),0 ,[PRINCIPAL_02] ) + Iif(IsNull([LOAN_02]),0,[LOAN_02] ) + Iif(IsNull([PRINCIPAL_03]),0,[PRINCIPAL_03] ) + Iif(IsNull([LOAN_03]),0,[LOAN_03] ) + [C_DEP]
